items.text: Setup camera for fish and security
Wrap garage door opener and unplug power
Travel day outfit: Long pants, Shirt, Hoodie, Socks, Shoes
Hair clips, hair ties, bobby pins

leaveHome.text: Set security alarm / notify security company
Turn off all taps and check for leaks
Switch off PowerPoints at the wall (except fridge)
Turn off gas supply if applicable
Remove or use up perishables from fridge
Check pantry for items that may expire
Take out all rubbish and recycling
Check mailbox is empty / hold mail service
Pause or reschedule any regular deliveries
Pause gym membership or group activities
Charge all devices (phones, tablets, power banks)
Notify emergency contact of travel plans
Water plants or arrange plant care
Set up lights on timers (if away long)
Close blinds/curtains and secure loose outdoor items

journeys.notes: ✈ Swiss LX ZRH→LHR 18:30 · ✈ EVA BR LHR→BKK 21:35
